steps.title: Use named tribe data
steps.content: The sentence needs the Los Coyotes Band's total area, because it is the example meant to support the claim that most California tribal nations are under 50 square miles.

steps.title: Reject wrong table entries
steps.content: A gives La Jolla's area, B belongs to Agua Caliente and is above 50, and C gives Pauma's area. The Los Coyotes Band is listed at 39.21 square miles, under the threshold. The answer is D.
